summary: Comprehensive testing of Gorecory Inventory Tracker - 17/17 backend tests passed, all frontend flows verified. Auth (register, login, legacy password upgrade), Items CRUD with MFG/Expiry dates, Reports (low-stock, near-expiry), Alerts (messages, email), Orders all working. Frontend: Landing page nav/CTAs, Login/Signup pages, AuthGuard, Logout, Sidebar toggle, Notification panel with email alerts, Products page with status filter and edit modal all functional.

issues: Brand icon visibility check returned False in closed state - may need verification if icon should remain visible when collapsed

seed_data_creation: Created legacy_test@test.com with plain-text password to verify auto-upgrade to bcrypt on login
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 bugs from gorecory_bug_spec.md appear to be fixed. Backend API tests cover auth (register, login, legacy upgrade), items CRUD with mfg/expiry dates, reports (low-stock, near-expiry), alerts (messages, email), orders. Frontend tests cover landing page (nav only Features+Integrations, all CTAs to /signup, footer copyright), login page (Sign up free link), signup page (validation, duplicate email error), AuthGuard (redirect without token), logout (clears localStorage), sidebar toggle (open/closed states, 72px collapsed width), notification panel (low stock, near expiry, active deliveries, send email alert), products page (status filter, edit modal with MFG/Expiry dates, reorder level preserved).
